title: Random Mobs
description: I add my fan's dum ideas to minecraft...
body:
This is the mod that currently adds 8 new mobs that were suggested by my community.
Every mob has a different mechaniks and functions.
Some of them can sell you a new items some of them are living in the new dungeons and some of them are pretty strong combat challenge.

**All mobs that tis mod adds:**

**Ground Golem** - ancien rock-like golem that will wakes up and tryes to kill you

**Green Alien** - this dude live in new structure an electro store, were he keeps his unknown special gadges

**Fryer Kohlrabi** - this new mob is old senior that will be agresive to you. However if you give him a K-card he will stop beating you

**Cursed Warlock** - Illager type mob that levitates with his head down. He can sell you useless... ehm usefull items for pork chops

**Doge** - This mob can sell you new armor and tools for Doge coins, that you can find in randomli generated chests.

**Crafting NPC** - Be carefull because this NPC can spawn when you triing to breake any crafting table. You can tame it with book of all crafting knowledge in minecraft and when is tamed, you can ride it. If you use book of all crafting knowledge  in minecraft on a stick while riding it, it will lead you to a nearest treasure.

**Giant chicken** - If you feed chicken with golden seeds it will grow

And **Herobrine** is definitely not in this mod!

Děkuji všem co poslílali svoje návrhy na moby ❤️
